content.finding: Different random initializations converging to different (beta, gamma) regions may have evolved different internal structures despite similar MI scores
content.evidence: Entry 009: 5 starting points converge to 5 different (beta, gamma) regions under finite-diff MI gradient
implications: Apparent convergence to local maxima may hide structural diversity
Different regions may represent qualitatively different computation strategies
Need to measure internal structure (alpha distributions, attention patterns) not just MI
Reinforces multiple-local-maxima finding (c005) but adds structural dimension
